name: novacode
description: Nova Code monorepo — API, dashboard, and shared types/logic

scripts.postinstall: npm run build -w @novacode/shared && npm run generate -w novacode-api
scripts.build: npm run build -w @novacode/shared && npm run build -w novacode-api && npm run build -w novacode-dashboard
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @novacode/shared && npm run typecheck -w novacode-api && npm run type-check -w novacode-dashboard
scripts.test: npm run test -w @novacode/shared && npm run test -w novacode-api && npm run test -w novacode-dashboard
